channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked drain, making a flood, 12th April
item.description:
There is a blocked drain or damaged drain in on Hither Green lane that keeps making a huge puddle outside of the le delice cafe. It goes all over the front shop and makes it very hard for customers to sit outside or walk past. The water is from a burst water pipe I believe. The situation has been on going for the last 4 months. Gets very bad when it rains also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones in Road, 12th April
item.description:
My neighbour keeps blocking the road with cones and traffic obstruction items he finds locally. He never uses the space he keeps clear and presumably it means that he is taking cones and signs from other areas they might be needed. If we move them he finds more, as he’s done now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden seats and storage box, 12th April
item.description:
This has been dumped outside a house in roughly this area. Wicker chairs and garden storage box. ( large)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
There’s been an accumulation of rubbish building up on Derwent Street. I haven’t seen the road sweeper for about 6 weeks. There’s a lot of rubbish that’s been present for best part of a month, beer cans/broken/glass/clothing/discarded vapes. Some of the bins haven’t been taken and are overflowing. It seems to be accumulating with no sign of reducing. Please can this be sorted asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derwent Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the street and footpath, 12th April
item.description:
Rubbish all over the street and footpath
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti, 12th April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish at my backyard at 78 Alexandra Road DA8 2BA, 12th April
item.description:
People are leaving rubbish at my back yard, near the car parking area. Its was previous reported, but nothing has been done yet. Before a huge green bag with building/ construction material was left. The people started to pile up things. Not only that, some people from council who clean the area left some bags of rubbish and told my husband that the council vehicle will collect. This issue has been ongoing for more than a year. Please I want my home and my neighbourhood to be clean. I request to remove all those rubbish from my area please. Thank you Sohany Shrestha House owner
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tip in Scadbury park carpark off St Paul's Wood Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Paul's Wood Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Household flytipping daily, 12th April
item.description:
Can someone investigate this daily problem of people just dumping their rubbish on Beechwood Road?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beechwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on street box at 42 Hillyard street Brixton SW9., 12th April
item.description:
Graffiti has been there sprayed on a light grey street box at 42 Hillyard street Brixton SW9. The graffiti has been there for over four months. Please can it be removed it be very much appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillyard Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
A swing is missing and one has been tied up meaning the kids cannot use it.

item.title: Graffiti sprayed at 261 Brixton road SW9 6LH. The graffiti is situated to the left hand side of the Jamm bar., 12th April
item.description:
Graffiti has been sprayed at 261 Brixton road SW9 6LH. The graffiti is against a black wooden fence situated directly next to the Jamm bar. There is also flyposting situated in very close proximity attached to traffic light posts. Please can they be cut down. The graffiti has been there for approximately over a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
